title: Activity Skunk Dataset
author: Alfonso Barragán Carmona
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The activity skunk dataset is a minute-by-minute dataset containing activity data from a significant sample of individuals aged 12 to 63 years.  
 This data is obtained through an activity wristband and collects intensity, number of steps, heart rate and raw type of activity. Within this fully anonymised sample (11625 records), that contains only standing, sitting, sleeping and walking activities data. 
  -- 05/01/2026 UPDATE --  
 Data with erroneous heart rate readings has been added in case it is of particular interest. A hash has been included to differentiate users. User age and other data is not included. Activities are assigned using the bracelet's internal algorithm, so errors may occur.

keywords: activity, heart rate, steps, activity band
